title: genista scorpius subsp. intermedia
intro: Genista scorpius subsp. intermedia, also known as the intermediate broom or genista, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and thorny stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Genista scorpius subsp. intermedia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress. Genista scorpius subsp. intermedia is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with medications and side effects.
